title: Roasted Creamy Australian Pasta
description: A comforting Australian-inspired pasta dish featuring roasted vegetables and a rich, creamy sauce. Perfect for a sick day or a relaxing evening in.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 220°C (425°F) while you prepare the vegetables.
Toss the carrots, zucchini, and onion with 1 tbsp of vegetable oil on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Cook the bowtie pasta according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a separate saucepan, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the miso paste and red wine vinegar to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the creme fraiche to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked bowtie pasta to the saucepan and toss to coat with the creamy sauce.
Season the pasta with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with the roasted vegetables and chopped parsley.
If using cheddar cheese, sprinkle on top of the pasta and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
